subject: feat(seed): create Default workspace alongside Demo on first visit
body:
New users previously only saw the Demo workspace on the workspace manager.
Now seedService also creates an empty Default workspace (ws-default) so
users have a personal workspace ready for their own data immediately.

The ensureDefaultWorkspace function uses check-then-create (idempotent),
matching the ensureDemoWorkspace pattern. Called in all three seed paths:
first visit (empty DB), version mismatch (re-seed), and data-exists
(skip seed but ensure workspace exists for edge cases like cleared
localStorage with retained IndexedDB).

Tags: seed, workspace, ux, first-visit
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: multiple-workspaces
Semver: minor
